input.tenant_message: The top hinge on my bedroom door is cracked and the door now sags and drags on the floor when I open or close it. It's also starting to scrape a groove into the hardwood floor which I don't want to be responsible for. It's been like this for about 10 days.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a maintenance visit to replace the broken hinge and re-hang the door. Inspect the floor for existing damage and document its condition before repair to clarify liability. Straightforward fix requiring basic carpentry tools.
